full_text:
Received a small piece of tissue containing a stiff white tumor tissue. Processed the whole piece.

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 mL DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µL Dispase + 100 µL DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 8.9 mL DMEM/F12+++, 1 mL Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 100 µL DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media. A 1:10 dilution was made for counting.

Sequentially dissociated cells: RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media. A 1:10 dilution was made for counting.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 4x 11.2 E6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 4x 8.175 E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 4.26 | 3.39
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.84 | 2.50
 | viability [%] | 66.7 | 73.7
 | size [µm] | 9.1 | 9.3
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 4.72 | 3.15
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.81 | 2.25
 | viability [%] | 59.6 | 71.4
 | size [µm] | 9.1 | 9.3
Average | [cells/ml] | 4.49 E6 | 3.27 E6
 | total [cells] | 44.9 E6 in 1 mL | 32.7 E6 in 1 ml
 | viability [%] | 63.15 | 72.55
